entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pest insect used as a host for the production of nuclear polyhedrosis virus

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA NUCLEAR POLYHEDROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: A virus used as a biopesticide to control Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: BIOPESTICIDE
entities.description: A biological agent used for pest control

entities.name: MALODOR
entities.description: An unpleasant smell associated with the virus recovery process

entities.name: VIRAL RECOVERY
entities.description: The process of extracting and optimizing the yield of the virus

entities.name: POST INOCULATION DAYS
entities.description: The time elapsed after inoculation used to determine the optimal harvest period

entities.name: POLY INCLUSION BODIES
entities.description: Proteinaceous structures containing virus particles produced during viral recovery

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The research facility in Andhra Pradesh where the studies were conducted

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: The percentage of larvae that die following NPV inoculation

entities.name: NPV YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of virus recovered per larva
